'''holafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wreathlike|wreathlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wreathlike|wreathlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| holafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:holafithi|holafithi]] || [[word:holafiji|holafiji]] || [[word:holafishi|holafishi]] || [[word:holafiki|holafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:holafuthuthu|holafuthuthu]] || [[word:holafujuju|holafujuju]] || [[word:holafushushu|holafushushu]] || [[word:holafukuku|holafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:holafuthu|holafuthu]] || [[word:holafuju|holafuju]] || [[word:holafushu|holafushu]] || [[word:holafuku|holafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:holafufthuf|holafufthuf]] || [[word:holafufjuf|holafufjuf]] || [[word:holafufshuf|holafufshuf]] || [[word:holafufkuf|holafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:holafethe|holafethe]] || [[word:holafeje|holafeje]] || [[word:holafeshe|holafeshe]] || [[word:holafeke|holafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:holafothotho|holafothotho]] || [[word:holafojojo|holafojojo]] || [[word:holafoshosho|holafoshosho]] || [[word:holafokoko|holafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:holafotho|holafotho]] || [[word:holafojo|holafojo]] || [[word:holafosho|holafosho]] || [[word:holafoko|holafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:holafofthof|holafofthof]] || [[word:holafofjof|holafofjof]] || [[word:holafofshof|holafofshof]] || [[word:holafofkof|holafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:holafÃŸfthÃŸf|holafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfjÃŸf|holafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfshÃŸf|holafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfkÃŸf|holafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:holafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|holafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|holafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|holafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|holafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:holafÃŸfthÃŸf|holafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfjÃŸf|holafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfshÃŸf|holafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfkÃŸf|holafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:holafÃŸfthÃŸf|holafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfjÃŸf|holafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfshÃŸf|holafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holafÃŸfkÃŸf|holafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:holafÃḊthÃḊ|holafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:holafÃḊjÃḊ|holafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:holafÃḊshÃḊ|holafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:holafÃḊkÃḊ|holafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:holafathatha|holafathatha]] || [[word:holafajaja|holafajaja]] || [[word:holafashasha|holafashasha]] || [[word:holafakaka|holafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:holafatha|holafatha]] || [[word:holafaja|holafaja]] || [[word:holafasha|holafasha]] || [[word:holafaka|holafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:holafafthaf|holafafthaf]] || [[word:holafafjaf|holafafjaf]] || [[word:holafafshaf|holafafshaf]] || [[word:holafafkaf|holafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:holafasha|holafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:holafshÃḋsha|holafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holafrosha|holafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holafmusha|holafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:holafyasha|holafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholafnkshÃḋsha|goholafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholafnkrosha|goholafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholafnkmusha|goholafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholafnkyasha|goholafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:holalafasha|holalafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holalafshÃḋsha|holalafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holalafrosha|holalafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holalafmusha|holalafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holalafyasha|holalafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholalafnkshÃḋsha|goholalafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholalafnkrosha|goholalafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholalafnkmusha|goholalafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholalafnkyasha|goholalafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:helÃḊfasha|helÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:helÃḊfshÃḋsha|helÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:helÃḊfrosha|helÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:helÃḊfmusha|helÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:helÃḊfyasha|helÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohelÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gohelÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohelÃḊfnkrosha|gohelÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohelÃḊfnkmusha|gohelÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohelÃḊfnkyasha|gohelÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:holfafasha|holfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holfafshÃḋsha|holfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holfafrosha|holfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holfafmusha|holfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holfafyasha|holfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholfafnkshÃḋsha|goholfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholfafnkrosha|goholfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholfafnkmusha|goholfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholfafnkyasha|goholfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
